SEARCH

Class AsciiMapRenderer

java.lang.Object
AsciiMapRenderer
public class AsciiMapRenderer extends Object
Utility class responsible for rendering ASCII maps in the console. This class belongs to the presentation layer of the application. It does not modify the business model: it only receives hospitals, patients, Delaunay triangles or Voronoi edges and displays them in a character-based grid. All methods are static because the class does not store any state.

Class type: Console rendering utility class.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Maïssa Tirsane, Anas Chokri, Iyed Souissi, Valery Vo-Van

  • Method Details

    • drawHospitalsAndDelaunay

      public static void drawHospitalsAndDelaunay(List<Hospital> hospitals, List<DelaunayTriangle> triangles, int width, int height)
      Displays hospitals and the Delaunay triangulation in the console. Hospitals are represented by numbers and Delaunay edges are represented with * characters.
      Parameters:
      hospitals - hospitals to display
      triangles - Delaunay triangles to draw
      width - width of the ASCII grid
      height - height of the ASCII grid

    • drawHospitalsPatientsAndDelaunay

      public static void drawHospitalsPatientsAndDelaunay(List<Hospital> hospitals, List<Patient> patients, List<DelaunayTriangle> triangles, int width, int height)
      Displays hospitals, patients and the Delaunay triangulation in the console.
      Parameters:
      hospitals - hospitals to display
      patients - patients to display
      triangles - Delaunay triangles to draw
      width - width of the ASCII grid
      height - height of the ASCII grid

    • drawHospitalsAndVoronoi

      public static void drawHospitalsAndVoronoi(List<Hospital> hospitals, List<VoronoiEdge> edges, int width, int height)
      Displays hospitals and Voronoi edges in the console.
      Parameters:
      hospitals - hospitals to display
      edges - Voronoi edges to draw
      width - width of the ASCII grid
      height - height of the ASCII grid

    • drawHospitalsPatientsAndVoronoi

      public static void drawHospitalsPatientsAndVoronoi(List<Hospital> hospitals, List<Patient> patients, List<VoronoiEdge> edges, int width, int height)
      Displays hospitals, patients and Voronoi edges in the console.
      Parameters:

      patients - patients to display
      edges - Voronoi edges to draw
      width - width of the ASCII grid
      height - height of the ASCII grid
